text.title: SDLC + AI Domain Overview Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure that walks an operator from trigger to validated artefact. Each step names its input, action, output, and (where applicable) a decision gate that stops the flow on policy violation.

step.name: extract-signal
step.action: Identify file extension / tool name / lifecycle stage.

step.name: pick-cluster
step.action: Map signal to one of 10 canonical clusters.

step.name: publish-route
step.action: Run validate-sdlc-ai.py; emit routing decision artefact.
